title: Provide specialist advice to clients
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Provide specialist advice to clients demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Develop and maintain specialist knowledge
